item.title: GovBrief Today #500
item.description: Five hundred nights ago, ten days into Trump's second term, I started dropping headlines into my family's group chat because I was scared by how fast the norms were coming apart. The next day I put them on my Facebook page. The day after that I posted them again and told everyone that since they'd gone a little gaga over it, I'd keep it coming if they wanted. They did. Friends shared it, then strangers did, and the thing took on a life I never planned for. I'm still the same guy who started this. I still believe the Trump administration is the biggest threat to America I have seen in my life, and I sit down every night to get it on the record. Five hundred nights, and I have never missed one. People often ask if they can send a few dollars to help, and I always tell them no. This is how I resist. I've been writing all my life and can do this myself, so it costs nothing but my time, and that's mine to give. It's free. It always has been, and it always will be. And I'll only ever ask you for your email address. But on night five hundred, I'm asking for a present. If you don't subscribe, please do it now. If you already subscribe, bring one person with you who needs this and doesn't know it exists yet. Five hundred down. We keep going. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260614-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/war-story-june14 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/midterms-ice [3] https://go.govbrief.today/anthropic-dc [4] https://go.govbrief.today/mcconnell-hospital [5] https://go.govbrief.today/regime-change [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-80th [7] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-accessible [8] https://go.govbrief.today/nokings-concert
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: When Notre-Dame burned in 2019, the world stopped.
item.description:
Today, Russia damages Kyiv Pechersk Lavra, a monastery nearly 1,000 years old and older than Notre-Dame itself.
A thousand years of history deserves the same attention, the same sympathy, and the same protection.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Michelle Obama Appreciation Day.
item.description:
A woman of warmth, class and beauty.
Present and reliable.
Loving Mom vibes. Caring and safe.
Beauty, brains and the whole enchilada. Thank you Mrs. Obama for being the representation we all need. And thank you for sacrificing your privacy and safety for us!
item.dc:creator: thornedrose27

26 Man Tax: Aaron Tveit
"The difficulty lies, not in the new ideas, but in escaping from the old ones." -John Maynard Keynes So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.*
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Obama appreciation day - presidential singalong
item.description:
February 2012. Mick Jagger begs Obama to come up on the stage to sing along "Sweet Home Chicago". With B.B. King, Troy “Trombone Shorty” Andrews, Jeff Beck, Derek Trucks, Gary Clark, Jr., Buddy Guy, Warren Haynes, Shemekia Copeland, Susan Tedeschi and Keb Mo... Epic.
June 2014. more solemn. Obama gave an impromptu rendition of "Amazing Grace" at a funeral after the mass shooting in Charleston church with 10 black victims. He read the names of the victims out loud afterwards.
item.dc:creator: Mehlbox

I also cry a lot. Oh my god I cry every time I drink for 3 reasons: 1. Thinking about politics and the state of the world. 2. I love my boyfriend. 3. I think about Superman (2025)
This is for Alli
He’s waiting for his mommy :)
Me with Daniel Pemberton. Idk I thought he was a really cool black guy and go and look him up right now. I was disappointed to say the least
Gertie tax
Baby Bruce tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: French Fry Fashion
item.description:
A significant portion of my wardrobe probably falls into McDonald's corporate branding guidelines, which is honestly one of my many life goals
One of the first times I donned my french fry earrings was for a local news segment in Chicago a few years ago. Morning news appearances require me to get up at 4am (a time I would be much more likely to go to bed) but they are fun nonetheless!
Earring closeup! I love their smiles :)
Not sure if anyone was ever curious about how I compile these photos, but here's one of the images I used before cutting it out of the background. I was originally just gonna share the photos straight outta my phone but being me, I had to go and complicate the process just for the sake of the tedium (for which I am most certainly a glutton). I made all kinds of minute changes to this image before adding it to the final compilation. I updated clothing colors and even extended my legs. Photoshop is pretty solid at background removal, but I always have to go in manually to clean it up so I often just do it all myself anyways.
This photo didn't make the cut but I figured I'd share it anyways. Fun fact: the Etch A Sketch in my hand is my red FAO Schwarz swarovski crystal edition, for which only four were ever made in the world. Color me cheeky! Hope you all had a good weekend!
item.dc:creator: pikajane
